3933525366.name: Marksman's Dodge
3933525366.description: Dodge to perform an evasive maneuver with a steady hand. Dodging automatically collects nearby ammo boxes and reloads all weapons.

2657901004.name: Knife Trick
2657901004.description: Throw a fan of flaming knives that scorch targets on hit.

1377143502.name: Slicewire Grenade
1377143502.description: A grenade that bounces and releases multiple whirling threads, severing targets.

2483898428.name: Whisper of Rending
2483898428.description: Primary ammo weapons do increased damage to [Stasis] Stasis crystals and frozen targets.

988980155.name: Flechette Storm
988980155.description:
While sliding, activate your charged melee ability to leap into the air, knocking nearby targets away and dealing damage.

While airborne, activate your charged melee again to launch a cluster of damaging, unraveling projectiles. Repeatedly activating melee will chain additional throws.

2835214897.name: Threaded Specter
2835214897.description:
Activating your class ability leaves behind a decoy woven from [Strand] Strand matter that draws the attention of nearby combatants.

After taking significant damage or when combatants approach, the decoy detonates, dealing damage and releasing Threadlings that seek out and attack nearby foes.

This ability's damage increases with your Class stat when your Class stat is 100 or higher.

1282157890.name: Gambler's Dodge
1282157890.description: Dodge to perform a deft tumble, avoiding combatant attacks and generating melee ability energy. Energy gain is scaled by your Melee stat. Dodging near enemies increases the energy gain.

3854948621.name: Echo of Vigilance
3854948621.description: Defeating a target while your shields are depleted grants you a temporary Void overshield.

1013086087.name: Fusion Grenade
1013086087.description: An explosive grenade that attaches to targets, damaging and moderately scorching them on detonation.

3531427694.name: High Jump
3531427694.description: While airborne, jump a second time to reach greater heights.

124726501.name: Facet of Honor
124726501.description: Collecting an Elemental pickup or destroying a Tangle grants Transcendence energy of the same type. +10 Melee ▲

1139822080.name: Phantom Surge
1139822080.description:
Dash forward, slashing combatants as you pass through them. Deals significantly increased damage to Void-debuffed targets, or targets marked by On The Prowl.
 
Generate Void Overshield for each combatant hit. Defeating at least one combatant grants additional Overshield and refunds melee ability energy.

83039195.name: Icarus Dash
83039195.description:
[Air Dodge]  : Dodge quickly while airborne.

While Heat Rises is active, you have an additional dodge.

While airborne, rapidly defeating targets with your Super or weapons cures you.

2400634603.name: Thermite Grenade
2400634603.description: A grenade that sends forth a burning line of fire, dealing damage and scorching targets in its path.

95544328.name: Triple Jump
95544328.description: While airborne, sustain your air control with a second or third jump.

3066103997.name: Crackshot
3066103997.description:
Activate your class ability to fire up to three scorching shots at combatants you've marked. Aim at targets to mark them.

Landing all three shots cures you.

This ability's damage increases with your Class stat when your Class stat is 100 or higher.

489583098.name: Thruster
489583098.description: Quickly evade in a lateral direction.

2716335211.name: Combination Blow
2716335211.description:
A quick strike that temporarily increases your melee damage when defeating a target, stacking three times.

Defeating targets with this, grants class ability energy and restores a small amount of health. Energy gain is scaled by your Class stat.

1680616210.name: Threaded Spike
1680616210.description: Throw a rope dart that bounces between targets, damaging and severing them. The dart will return to you once it's done, returning melee energy to you for each target hit. Press [Melee] just as the dart gets back to you to catch it and increase the amount of energy returned.

2934767476.name: Shatterdive
2934767476.description: Activate while midair to quickly descend and shatter nearby targets on impact. Shattering targets grants you Frost Armor.

1514173218.name: Scatter Grenade
1514173218.description: A grenade that splits into many submunitions and covers a large area with multiple explosions.

2274196887.name: Well of Radiance
2274196887.description: Thrust your Sword into the ground, damaging and scorching nearby targets. The sword projects a continuous aura, granting radiant effects and restoration to nearby allies, protecting them from the effects of Stasis.

1869939006.name: Winter's Wrath
1869939006.description:
Summon a [Stasis] Stasis staff. While your Super is active:

[Super Primary]  : Cast out a barrage of [Stasis] Stasis shards that freeze targets.

[Super Secondary]  : Cast out a shockwave that shatters all frozen targets.

2716335210.name: Disorienting Blow
2716335210.description: Striking a target with this melee ability blinds them, amplifies you, and grants you a moderate amount of Bolt Charge.

1005476557.name: Hailfire Spike
1005476557.description: [Grenade]  : Throw a device charged with [Stasis] Stasis matter and [Solar] Solar energy that attaches to surfaces or targets, then erupts into a slowing storm. After a short duration, the device ignites, creating a deadly scorching cyclone.

2274196884.name: Song of Flame
2274196884.description:
Unleash your inner fire, making your equipped weapons radiant and enhancing your abilities.

[Melee]  : Release a supercharged melee attack that launches additional projectiles.

[Grenade]  : Create a sentient flame wisp that seeks out targets and detonates in a scorching explosion, then seeks out other nearby targets.

While Song of Flame is active, you and nearby allies regenerate abilities more quickly, are more resistant to incoming damage, and your [Solar] Solar and Kinetic weapons scorch targets.

20616658.name: High Jump
20616658.description: While airborne, jump a second time to reach greater heights.

1980796560.name: Shield Throw
1980796560.description: Hurl your Void Shield toward a target. The shield can ricochet off targets and surfaces, granting Overshield for each target hit.

2722641741.name: Rally Barricade
2722641741.description: Creates a small barrier that you can peek over while aiming down sights; increases weapon reload speed, stability, and range. Draws hostile fire when you stand behind it.

2809141585.name: Void Wall
2809141585.description: A grenade that creates a horizontal wall of burning Void Light.

124726504.name: Facet of Dominance
124726504.description: Your Void grenades weaken targets, and your Arc grenades jolt targets.

1237488986.name: Burst Glide
1237488986.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with a strong initial boost of speed.

2543177538.name: Penumbral Blast
2543177538.description: Raise your [Stasis] Stasis staff against your foe. Send a blast of [Stasis] Stasis forward to freeze your targets.

3769507633.name: Arc Staff
3769507633.description:
Form a staff of pure Arc energy and acrobatically take out your foes.

[Block] : Hold to deflect incoming projectiles with your Arc staff.

Deflecting a projectile grants you a stack of Bolt Charge.

Heavy attack combos and airborne heavy slams blind targets.

2626922124.name: Facet of Courage
2626922124.description: Your [Arc] Arc, [Solar] Solar, and [Void] Void abilities deal increased damage to targets afflicted with Darkness debuffs.

1262901521.name: Unbreakable
1262901521.description:
[Grenade]  : Hold to summon a [Void] Void shield that draws hostile fire and blocks a portion of incoming damage, gradually draining your grenade energy and granting an Overshield over time.

Releasing the grenade input or running out of energy releases a frontal blast from your shield that disorients combatants and deals increased damage based on how much damage was blocked. Final blows with the frontal blast grant you Devour.

Combatants that come in contact with your shield are temporarily disoriented.

2661180601.name: Echo of Harvest
2661180601.description: Defeating weakened targets creates an Orb of Power and a Void Breach.

2722573683.name: Shadowshot: Deadfall
2722573683.description:
Tether foes to a Void Anchor, dramatically weakening and suppressing them for you and your allies.

The Void Anchors fired from Shadowshot pull targets toward the impact point, which then become traps and wait for prey. Void Anchors have increased range and last longer.

2984351205.name: Sol Invictus
2984351205.description:
Solar ability final blows, Hammer of Sol impacts, and defeating scorched targets creates Sunspots. Your abilities regenerate faster, and your Super drains more slowly while standing in a Sunspot.

Sunspots apply scorch and deal damage to targets inside. Entering a Sunspot applies restoration.

3277705907.name: Spark of Feedback
3277705907.description: Taking melee damage briefly increases your outgoing melee damage. +10 Health ▲

988980152.name: Drengr's Lash
988980152.description:
Activate your Barricade ability to create a ripple in reality that travels forward along the ground, suspending and damaging the targets it hits.

Final blows on targets affected by Suspend, Unravel, or Sever grant class ability energy.

This ability's damage increases with your Class stat when your Class stat is 100 or higher.

124726499.name: Facet of Ruin
124726499.description: Increases the size and damage of the burst when you shatter a Stasis crystal or frozen target, and increases the area of effect of Solar ignitions. +10 Weapon ▲

4094417246.name: Frenzied Blade
4094417246.description: Activate your charged melee ability to dash forward, slashing at targets in front of you and severing them.

2626922123.name: Facet of Solitude
2626922123.description: Landing rapid precision hits emits a severing blast from the target. While transcendent, the severing blast is bigger.

2747500760.name: Burning Maul
2747500760.description:
Summon a flaming maul and crush targets with the force of an earthquake.

[Light Attack]  : Spin the maul in a circle around you, damaging nearby targets.

[Heavy Attack]  : Slam the maul to the ground and create a cyclone of flames that seeks targets, dealing damage and scorching them.

469281041.name: Strafe Lift
469281041.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air with strong directional control.

2722573681.name: Shadowshot: Moebius Quiver
2722573681.description:
Tether foes to a Void Anchor, dramatically weakening and suppressing them for you and your allies.

Fire two volleys of three Void Arrows that seek nearby targets. Shadowshot makes targets volatile and deals increased damage to tethered targets. Defeating tethered targets creates Orbs of Power.

While the Super is active, dealing damage increases the damage of your Void Arrows and Bow weapons.

1980796563.name: Thunderclap
1980796563.description:
[Melee] : Hold while grounded to plant your feet and begin charging your fist with Arc energy.

[Melee] : Release to unleash a devastating blast in front of you, dealing damage that increases with longer charge time.

362132288.name: Ember of Torches
362132288.description: Powered melee attacks against combatants make you and nearby allies radiant. -10 Grenade ▼

2628485818.name: Balanced Glide
2628485818.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with both moderate speed and directional control.

2483898431.name: Whisper of Hunger
2483898431.description: Increases the melee energy gained from picking up [Stasis] Stasis shards. -20 Melee ▼

5333292.name: Strafe Glide
5333292.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with strong directional control.

4241856103.name: Storm Grenade
4241856103.description: A grenade that calls down a focused lightning storm.

3696633656.name: Transcendence
3696633656.description:
Achieve harmony by dealing damage with Light and Dark damage types in equal measure or by applying subclass buffs to your allies. Kinetic damage generates both Light and Dark energy.

While Transcendence is active, your grenade is replaced by a unique Prismatic grenade that deals both Light and Dark damage. Dealing melee damage while transcendent greatly increases your grenade energy regeneration, and vice versa. Defeating targets while transcendent extends its duration.

1980796564.name: Frenzied Blade
1980796564.description: Activate your charged melee ability to dash forward, slashing at targets in front of you and severing them.

2816982784.name: Marksman's Dodge
2816982784.description: Dodge to perform an evasive maneuver with a steady hand. Dodging automatically collects nearby ammo boxes and reloads all weapons.

2272984656.name: Echo of Dilation
2272984656.description: While crouched, you sneak faster and gain enhanced radar resolution.

2370269388.name: Storm's Edge
2370269388.description:
Summon an electrified dagger and throw it in your aim direction.

When the dagger hits a surface or a target, you blink to its location and perform a powerful whirling strike, damaging any nearby targets. Can be reactivated after the strike to perform additional throws.

If the dagger flies for long enough without impacting anything, it detonates and you blink to the detonation location.

4208512221.name: Thread of Transmutation
4208512221.description: While you have Woven Mail, weapon final blows create a Tangle. +10 Melee ▲

4208512211.name: Thread of Evolution
4208512211.description: Threadlings travel farther and deal additional damage. +10 Super ▲

1255073825.name: Void Spike
1255073825.description: A grenade that attaches to any surface and emits a torrent of damaging Void Light.

375052471.name: Blade Barrage
375052471.description: Vault into the air and unleash a volley of Solar-charged knives that explode and scorch targets.

469281042.name: Catapult Lift
469281042.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air with a strong initial burst of momentum.

2481624867.name: Storm Grenade
2481624867.description: A grenade that calls down a focused lightning storm.

124726498.name: Facet of Purpose
124726498.description: Picking up an Orb of Power grants either Bolt Charge, Restoration, Frost Armor, Woven Mail, or Overshield based on the damage type of your equipped Super.

83039193.name: Touch of Flame
83039193.description:
Your Healing, Solar, Firebolt, and Fusion Grenades have enhanced functionality.

Healing Grenade: Improves the strength of cure and restoration effects applied. Consuming a Healing Grenade with Heat Rises also applies restoration to nearby allies.

Solar Grenade: Increases linger duration. Periodically emits blobs of lava around its perimeter.

Firebolt Grenade: Increases target search radius and maximum target count.

Fusion Grenade: Explodes twice.

1293395729.name: Electrostatic Mind
1293395729.description:
Defeating targets with Arc abilities or defeating jolted or blinded targets creates an Ionic Trace.

Collecting an Ionic Trace makes you amplified.

2272984671.name: Echo of Persistence
2272984671.description: Void buffs applied to you (Invisibility, Overshield, and Devour) have increased duration.

3897682694.name: Arcbolt Grenade
3897682694.description: A grenade that chains bolts of lightning to nearby targets.

2722573682.name: Spectral Blades
2722573682.description:
Summon a pair of deadly Void blades and stalk the battlefield in a veil of shadows.

[Light Attack]  : Perform a quick melee attack.

[Heavy Attack]  : Perform a heavy attack that weakens your target, and once again vanish from sight.

3350493949.name: High Lift
3350493949.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air to greater heights.

2868073560.name: Rally Barricade
2868073560.description: Creates a small barrier that you can peek over while aiming down sights; increases weapon reload speed, stability, and range. Draws hostile fire when you stand behind it.

3066103999.name: On Your Mark
3066103999.description:
Activating your class ability or landing precision hits grants you and nearby allies increased reload speed and Weapons stat for a short duration. Stacks ten times.

Final blows while at ten stacks cure you.

1282157891.name: Marksman's Dodge
1282157891.description: Dodge to perform an evasive maneuver with a steady hand. Dodging automatically collects nearby ammo boxes and reloads all weapons.

2483898429.name: Whisper of Conduction
2483898429.description: Nearby [Stasis] Stasis shards track to your position. +10 Super ▲ +10 Health ▲

1399217.name: Glacier Grenade
1399217.description: A grenade that creates walls out of [Stasis] Stasis crystals to block damage and freeze targets; these walls can be shattered for damage.

4180586737.name: Ember of Mercy
4180586737.description:
When you revive an ally, you and other nearby allies gain restoration.

Picking up a Firesprite grants restoration.  +10 Health ▲

362132301.name: Ember of Blistering
362132301.description: Defeating targets with Solar ignitions grants grenade energy.

1444664836.name: Phoenix Dive
1444664836.description: Dive to the ground and create a burst of Solar Light that cures nearby allies.

790664812.name: Lightning Surge
790664812.description: While sliding, activate your charged melee ability to blink forward, calling down lightning strikes that jolt targets as you rematerialize. This ability also makes you amplified and grants Bolt Charge.

426473316.name: Marksman's Dodge
426473316.description: Dodge to perform an evasive maneuver with a steady hand. Dodging automatically collects nearby ammo boxes and reloads all weapons.

3969294337.name: Thermite Grenade
3969294337.description: A grenade that sends forth a burning line of fire, dealing damage and scorching targets in its path.

2657901002.name: Threaded Spike
2657901002.description: Throw a rope dart that bounces between targets, damaging and severing them. The dart will return to you once it's done, returning melee energy to you for each target hit. Press [Melee] just as the dart gets back to you to catch it and increase the amount of energy returned.

1262901523.name: Knockout
1262901523.description:
Critically wounding a target or breaking their shield infuses your melee attacks with Arc energy and increases your melee range against combatants and melee damage against combatants and Guardians for a short time.

Defeating targets with melee attacks makes you amplified and restores a portion of your health. Defeating more powerful combatants increases the amount of health restored.

4249729125.name: Threaded Specter
4249729125.description:
Activating your class ability leaves behind a decoy woven from [Strand] Strand matter that draws the attention of nearby combatants.

After taking significant damage or when combatants approach, the decoy detonates, dealing damage and releasing Threadlings that seek out and attack nearby foes.

This ability's damage increases with your Class stat when your Class stat is 100 or higher.

2225231092.name: High Lift
2225231092.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air to greater heights.

1444664838.name: Healing Rift
1444664838.description: Conjure a well of power that continuously heals those inside it.

537774542.name: Whisper of Fractures
537774542.description: Shattering a frozen target with a melee attack grants a stack of Frost Armor.

2529942647.name: Hammer of Sol
2529942647.description:
Summon a flaming hammer and wreak destruction down upon your enemies.

[Light Attack]  : Throw your hammer at foes.

Upon impact, your hammers shatter into explosive molten shards.

3933525367.name: Gambler's Dodge
3933525367.description: Dodge to perform a deft tumble, avoiding combatant attacks and generating melee ability energy. Energy gain is scaled by your Melee stat. Dodging near enemies increases the energy gain.

1588878496.name: Blink
1588878496.description: Jump while airborne to teleport a short distance.

2209081648.name: Empowering Rift
2209081648.description:
Conjure a well of power that increases weapon damage and ability energy regeneration for those inside it.

Defeating combatants while standing in the Rift grants additional ammo generation.

2661180603.name: Echo of Starvation
2661180603.description: Picking up a Void Breach or an Orb of Power grants Devour.

2216698406.name: Solar Grenade
2216698406.description: A grenade that creates a flare of Solar Light that continuously damages and scorches targets trapped inside.

1727069365.name: Spark of Momentum
1727069365.description: Sliding over ammo bricks reloads your equipped weapon and grants you a small amount of Bolt Charge.

1980796561.name: Shiver Strike
1980796561.description: Hold input to leap through the air. Releasing unleashes a powerful dash attack that knocks targets back and attaches a delayed Stasis explosive to them.

1920417385.name: Grim Harvest
1920417385.description:
Picking up [Stasis] Stasis shards grants stacks of Frost Armor.

While you have Frost Armor, defeating combatants with Stasis or Kinetic weapons may cause them to shatter, damaging nearby foes. The shatter chance increases with your Frost Armor stacks.

Taking damage while you have Frost Armor generates class ability energy.

3531427695.name: Strafe Jump
3531427695.description: While airborne, jump a second time with strong directional control.

4194622039.name: Ascension
4194622039.description:
[Air Move]  While airborne, consume your class ability energy to summon your Arc Staff, propelling yourself upward and creating a burst of energy around you that amplifies allies and jolts targets.

This ability's damage increases with your Class stat when your Class stat is 100 or higher.

1656118682.name: Nova Bomb: Cataclysm
1656118682.description:
Hurl an explosive bolt of Void Light at a target, disintegrating those caught within its blast.

Nova Bomb travels slowly and seeks targets. Detonations shatter into smaller seeker projectiles.

1048847436.name: Vortex Grenade
1048847436.description: A grenade that creates a Vortex that pulls targets inward and continually damages those trapped inside.

1016030582.name: Vortex Grenade
1016030582.description: A grenade that creates a Vortex that pulls targets inward and continually damages those trapped inside.

1656549673.name: Juggernaut
1656549673.description:
With full class ability energy and after sprinting for a short time, you gain a frontal shield that blocks incoming damage. When the frontal shield breaks, your class ability energy is depleted. When the frontal shield takes damage, you gain a stack of Bolt Charge.

While amplified, the shield blocks significantly more damage before breaking.

3040080535.name: Healing Grenade
3040080535.description: A grenade that cures allies on impact and creates an Orb of benevolent Solar Light, granting restoration to allies when picked up.

988980153.name: Into the Fray
988980153.description:
Destroying a Tangle or casting your Super grants Woven Mail for nearby allies.

While you have Woven Mail, your melee regeneration rate is increased.

1869939005.name: Song of Flame
1869939005.description:
Unleash your inner fire, making your equipped weapons radiant and enhancing your abilities.

[Melee]  : Release a supercharged melee attack that launches additional projectiles.

[Grenade]  : Create a sentient flame wisp that seeks out targets and detonates in a scorching explosion, then seeks out other nearby targets.

While Song of Flame is active, you and nearby allies regenerate abilities more quickly, are more resistant to incoming damage, and your [Solar] Solar and Kinetic weapons scorch targets.

262821317.name: Weaver's Call
262821317.description:
Activate your class ability to weave three Threadlings and deploy any Threadlings you have perched.

Dealing damage and defeating targets generates perched Threadlings.

2651551055.name: Glacial Harvest
2651551055.description:
Picking up [Stasis] Stasis shards grants stacks of Frost Armor.

While you have Frost Armor, defeating combatants with Stasis or Kinetic weapons may cause them to shatter, damaging other nearby foes. The shatter chance increases with your Frost Armor stacks.

Taking damage while you have Frost Armor generates grenade energy.

124726496.name: Facet of Blessing
124726496.description: Melee final blows start health regeneration. While transcendent, melee final blows start health regeneration for you and nearby allies.

1380268166.name: High Lift
1380268166.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air to greater heights.

1237488985.name: Balanced Glide
1237488985.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with both moderate speed and directional control.

2368990401.name: Whisper of Chill
2368990401.description: [Stasis] Stasis weapon final blows have a chance to create a Stasis Shard.

4208512217.name: Thread of Finality
4208512217.description: Finisher final blows create Threadlings. +10 Class ▲

25156515.name: Healing Rift
25156515.description: Conjure a well of power that continuously heals those inside it.

1656118680.name: Nova Warp
1656118680.description:
Step between dimensions to subvert the laws of physics.

[Super Secondary]  : Teleport a short distance and release weakening seekers.

[Super Primary]  : Unleash a deadly Void eruption. A fully charged attack makes targets volatile.

2370269391.name: Silence and Squall
2370269391.description:
Summon two Stasis kamas, Silence and Squall, that you throw one after another.

Silence : Creates a flash-freeze blast that freezes and damages targets.

Squall : Creates a Stasis Storm that slows and damages targets caught inside.

2934767477.name: Winter's Shroud
2934767477.description:
Dodging slows nearby targets.

Slowing targets briefly increases your class ability regeneration.

1727069362.name: Spark of Discharge
1727069362.description:
Arc weapon final blows have a chance to create an Ionic Trace.

Collecting an Ionic Trace grants you a stack of Bolt Charge. -10 Melee ▼

1656549675.name: Storm's Keep
1656549675.description:
Cast your class ability to grant a moderate amount of Bolt Charge stacks to you and nearby allies.

While behind your Barricade, you and allies gain stacks of Bolt Charge over time and your weapons can discharge max stacks of Bolt Charge.

1293395728.name: Ionic Sentry
1293395728.description:
Defeat targets with Kinetic or Arc weapons or Arc abilities to charge up an Arc turret that periodically chains lightning between nearby targets, granting a stack of Bolt Charge with each hit.

[Grenade]  : Deploy the Ionic Sentry, blinding nearby targets on initial impact.

Ionic Sentry damage is scaled by the enhanced benefit of the Grenade stat.

2946990961.name: Tripmine Grenade
2946990961.description: An explosive grenade that sticks to surfaces and detonates when targets pass through its laser trigger, dealing damage and moderately scorching them.

5333295.name: Blink
5333295.description: Jump while airborne to teleport a short distance.

2816982785.name: Gambler's Dodge
2816982785.description: Dodge to perform a deft tumble, avoiding combatant attacks and generating melee ability energy. Energy gain is scaled by your Melee stat. Dodging near enemies increases the energy gain.

537774540.name: Whisper of Chains
537774540.description: Defeating targets while you have Frost Armor has a chance to create a [Stasis] Stasis shard. +10 Class ▲

3350493951.name: Catapult Lift
3350493951.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air with a strong initial burst of momentum.

362132295.name: Ember of Beams
362132295.description: Your Solar Super projectiles have stronger target acquisition. +10 Super ▲

3192552691.name: Thread of Generation
3192552691.description: Dealing damage generates grenade energy. -10 Grenade ▼

2529942642.name: Bladefury
2529942642.description:
[Super]  : Create two woven blades and roam the battlefield. While active:

[Light Attack]  : Perform a leaping slash towards nearby targets, severing them on hit and dealing bonus damage to suspended targets. Each successful hit briefly increases your attack speed and grants energy for your heavy attack.

[Heavy Attack]  : Unleash a heavy upward slash, creating two suspending projectiles that seek out targets.

1698387814.name: High Lift
1698387814.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air to greater heights.

146194908.name: Skip Grenade
146194908.description: A grenade that splits upon impact, creating multiple projectiles that seek targets.

2628485817.name: Burst Glide
2628485817.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with a strong initial boost of speed.

2626922122.name: Facet of Hope
2626922122.description: While you have an elemental buff, your class ability regenerates more quickly.

1727069366.name: Spark of Resistance
1727069366.description: While surrounded by combatants, you are more resistant to incoming damage. +10 Melee ▲

375052468.name: Golden Gun: Marksman
375052468.description:
Summon a precision flaming pistol that scorches and disintegrates targets with Solar Light.

Your Golden Gun deals massively increased precision damage, overpenetrates targets, and creates Orbs of Power on precision hits.

Benefits from being radiant.

2626922120.name: Facet of Protection
2626922120.description: While surrounded by combatants, you are more resistant to incoming damage. While transcendent, the effect is increased.

988980154.name: Banner of War
988980154.description:
Defeat a target with a melee attack, finisher, or Sword to raise a Banner of War that pulses with energy, periodically healing nearby allies and increasing melee and Sword damage. 

Targets defeated by you and nearby allies charge the banner, increasing the speed of its pulses.

187655372.name: Trapper's Ambush
187655372.description:
Activate your air move to consume your class ability energy and dive to the ground, damaging targets on impact. Damage is greatly increased if striking while you have any Void status effect.

Damaging opponents with this ability heals you. Defeating combatants with this ability grants Devour.

This ability's damage increases with your Class stat when your Class stat is 100 or higher.

3636300852.name: Acrobat's Dodge
3636300852.description: Dodge to perform an acrobatic leap. Upon landing, make yourself and nearby allies radiant.

1341767667.name: Withering Blade
1341767667.description:
Toss a [Stasis] Stasis Shuriken at targets to damage and slow them.  

Provides multiple charges.

262821319.name: The Wanderer
262821319.description:
Tangles you throw attach to targets and detonate into a suspending burst. Destroying a Tangle creates a suspending burst after a short delay.

Threadling final blows create Tangles or reduce your current Tangle cooldown.

890263315.name: Balanced Glide
890263315.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with both moderate speed and directional control.

1293395730.name: Lightning Surge
1293395730.description: While sliding, activate your charged melee ability to blink forward, calling down lightning strikes that jolt targets as you rematerialize. This ability also makes you amplified and grants Bolt Charge.

1262901522.name: Diamond Lance
1262901522.description:
Shatter or defeat targets with abilities or [Stasis] Stasis weapons to create a Stasis lance.

[Shoot]  : Throw the lance to freeze targets on impact.

[Melee]  : Slam the lance to the ground to freeze targets in a small area.

4016776972.name: Knife Trick
4016776972.description: Throw a fan of flaming knives that scorch targets on hit.

1262901520.name: Consecration
1262901520.description:
While sliding, activate your charged melee ability to launch a wave of [Solar] Solar energy forward, damaging and scorching targets in front of you as you leap into the air.

While airborne, activate your charged melee again to slam to the ground and create a second larger wave of damaging [Solar] Solar energy. If the wave hits a scorched target, they ignite.

2463983862.name: Silkstrike
2463983862.description:
Weave a vicious rope dart and tear through your targets.

[Light Attack]  : Swing the rope dart in front of you to deal damage. The tip of the dart deals bonus damage, and defeating targets with the tip causes them to explode.

[Heavy Attack]  : Swing the rope dart in a circular motion to deal heavy damage all around you.

[Grenade]  : Use the grapple to move forward quickly.

668903196.name: Iceflare Bolts
668903196.description: Shattering a frozen target spawns seekers that track and freeze other nearby targets.

790664814.name: Hellion
790664814.description:
Activate your class ability to summon a [Solar] Solar mortar that lobs flaming projectiles at distant targets. Targets damaged by the mortar are scorched.

Hellion damage is scaled by the enhanced benefit of the Grenade stat.

2909720723.name: Flashbang Grenade
2909720723.description: An explosive grenade that damages and blinds nearby targets.

3066103998.name: Knock 'Em Down
3066103998.description:
Your Solar Supers are enhanced. Deadshot Golden Gun has damage resistance, Marksman Golden Gun has increased duration, and Blade Barrage launches more projectiles.

While radiant, final blows with your equipped Throwing Knife fully refund your melee energy.

1656549672.name: Touch of Thunder
1656549672.description:
Your Flashbang, Pulse, Lightning, and Storm Grenades have enhanced functionality.

Flashbang Grenade: Emits an additional blinding detonation on bounce.

Pulse Grenade: Creates Ionic Traces periodically as it damages targets and increases in damage over time.

Lightning Grenade: Grants an additional grenade charge, jolts targets hit by the initial blast, and grants Bolt Charge when it causes damage.

Storm Grenade: After detonating, creates a roaming thundercloud that tracks nearby targets and fires bolts of lightning at foes beneath it.

2495523341.name: Rally Barricade
2495523341.description: Creates a small barrier that you can peek over while aiming down sights; increases weapon reload speed, stability, and range. Draws hostile fire when you stand behind it.

266130437.name: Catapult Lift
266130437.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air with a strong initial burst of momentum.

1237488987.name: Strafe Glide
1237488987.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with strong directional control.

1128768654.name: High Jump
1128768654.description: While airborne, jump a second time to reach greater heights.

3260056809.name: Rally Barricade
3260056809.description: Creates a small barrier that you can peek over while aiming down sights; increases weapon reload speed, stability, and range. Draws hostile fire when you stand behind it.

1602994569.name: Bastion
1602994569.description:
Cast your Super to grant Overshield to nearby allies. 

Casting your Barricade grants Overshield to yourself and nearby allies and empowers it, enabling it to slowly regenerate the Overshield of allies bunkering behind it and extend their Overshield duration.

790664815.name: Feed the Void
790664815.description:
Defeat a target with any ability to activate Devour.

Your Devour effects are improved, restoring additional health and grenade energy.

4051767608.name: Duskfield Grenade
4051767608.description: A grenade that shatters on impact, leaving behind a field that slows targets and freezes those who do not leave the volume.

2272984665.name: Echo of Expulsion
2272984665.description: Void ability final blows cause targets to explode.

1380268167.name: Strafe Lift
1380268167.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air with strong directional control.

2657901006.name: Withering Blade
2657901006.description:
Toss a [Stasis] Stasis Shuriken at targets to damage and slow them.  

Provides multiple charges.

2321824285.name: Chaos Accelerant
2321824285.description:
[Grenade]  : Overcharge your grenade, making it deadlier and more effective.

Vortex Grenade: Increases the size, linger duration, and pull of the vortex.

Axion Bolt: Detonates twice and has enhanced seekers.

Scatter Grenade: Submunitions track to nearby targets.

Magnetic Grenade, Spike Grenade, Voidwall Grenade, and Suppressor Grenade: Releases a short-range Void blast. Cooldown is reduced.

Grants an additional grenade charge.

2626922125.name: Facet of Devotion
2626922125.description: Defeating targets afflicted with [Stasis] Stasis or [Strand] Strand debuffs grants bonus Light Transcendence energy.

2835214903.name: Gunpowder Gamble
2835214903.description:
Defeat targets to charge up an improvised [Solar] Solar explosive.

[Grenade]  : Throw a [Solar] Solar explosive that can be shot in mid-air to cause an ignition.

4154539169.name: Strafe Glide
4154539169.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with strong directional control.

469281040.name: High Lift
469281040.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air to greater heights.

1190101211.name: Transcendence
1190101211.description:
Achieve harmony by dealing damage with Light and Dark damage types in equal measure or by applying subclass buffs to your allies. Kinetic damage generates both Light and Dark energy.

While Transcendence is active, your grenade is replaced by a unique Prismatic grenade that deals both Light and Dark damage. Dealing melee damage while transcendent greatly increases your grenade energy regeneration, and vice versa. Defeating targets while transcendent extends its duration.

119041298.name: Thundercrash
119041298.description: Hurtle through the air like a missile and crash into targets to inflict meteoric damage.

187655375.name: On the Prowl
187655375.description:
Periodically marks a nearby combatant as a priority target for you and your team. Entering invisibility immediately marks a target.

Defeating priority targets creates a weakening cloud of smoke that makes you and allies invisible when passing through it. 

When priority targets are defeated, you and nearby allies gain increased weapon reload speed and stability for a short duration and are granted grenade, melee, and class ability energy.

4208512210.name: Thread of Propagation
4208512210.description: Powered melee final blows grant your [Strand] Strand weapons Unraveling Rounds. +10 Melee ▲

2711519343.name: Acrobat's Dodge
2711519343.description: Dodge to perform an acrobatic leap. Upon landing, make yourself and nearby allies radiant.

1323461861.name: Pulse Grenade
1323461861.description: A grenade that periodically damages targets within its explosion radius.

1081893461.name: Chaos Reach
1081893461.description:
Unleash a long-range channeled beam of concentrated Arc energy. Sustained damage on a single target creates a jolting lightning strike at their position.

 [Super]  while active to deactivate your Super early, saving Super energy.

2984351207.name: Shieldburst
2984351207.description:
Enhances your equipped barricade with [Solar] Solar capabilities.

Towering Barricade: Your barricade slides forward across the ground before stopping, allowing you to advance in safety.

Rally Barricade: Standing behind your barricade grants scorching rounds to your allies' Solar and Kinetic weapons.

While your barricade is deployed, activate your class ability again to remotely detonate it, scorching combatants caught in the detonation. Dealing damage increases the power of the blast.

This ability's damage increases with your Class stat when your Class stat is 100 or higher.

4194622038.name: Lethal Current
4194622038.description:
After dodging, your next melee attack has increased lunge range, jolts the target, and creates a damaging aftershock.

Damaging any jolted target with melee attacks also blinds them.

2028772231.name: Shiver Strike
2028772231.description: Hold input to leap through the air. Releasing unleashes a powerful dash attack that knocks targets back and attaches a delayed Stasis explosive to them.

1980796562.name: Hammer Strike
1980796562.description:
After sprinting for a short time, use this melee ability to swing a blazing hammer that scorches your target and deals damage in a cone behind them.

If your target is defeated by Hammer Strike, they ignite.

1602994570.name: Offensive Bulwark
1602994570.description:
While you have an Overshield or are inside Ward of Dawn, final blows grant grenade and melee energy, you have increased melee range and damage, and melee final blows restore a small portion of your Overshield and extend its duration.

You gain an additional Shield Throw while in Sentinel Shield.

3066103996.name: Gunpowder Gamble
3066103996.description:
Defeat targets to charge up an improvised Solar explosive.

[Grenade]  : Throw a Solar explosive that can be shot in mid-air to cause an ignition.

275534325.name: Electrified Snare
275534325.description: [Grenade]  : Throw an explosive device energized with [Strand] Strand matter and [Arc] Arc energy that detonates in a supercharged suspending burst. The suspended target takes heavy damage over time and chains jolting lightning to any nearby targets.

3469412968.name: Whisper of Refraction
3469412968.description: Defeating slowed or frozen targets grants you class ability energy.

1602994568.name: Controlled Demolition
1602994568.description: Hitting a target with a Void ability or Volatile explosion makes them volatile. Further damage to a volatile target causes them to explode. Grants you and nearby allies health when volatile targets explode near you.

3644045870.name: Pocket Singularity
3644045870.description:
Launch an unstable ball of Void energy that detonates when it nears a target, pushing them away from the blast and making them volatile.  

Provides multiple charges.

2272984666.name: Echo of Remnants
2272984666.description: Your lingering grenade effects (Vortex Grenade, Void Wall, Void Spike, and Axion Bolt) have increased duration.

1727069360.name: Spark of Focus
1727069360.description: After sprinting for a short time, your class ability regeneration is increased.

2307689415.name: Arcane Needle
2307689415.description: Sling a woven needle that will embed in your target, unraveling them. Activate your melee ability again to chain up to two additional attacks.

362132300.name: Ember of Solace
362132300.description: Radiant and restoration effects applied to you have increased duration.

3277705904.name: Spark of Volts
3277705904.description: Finishers make you amplified and grant you a stack of Bolt Charge. +10 Class ▲

95544331.name: Strafe Jump
95544331.description: While airborne, jump a second time with strong directional control.

2708585276.name: Ballistic Slam
2708585276.description:
After sprinting and while airborne, activate your charged melee ability to slam to the ground, dealing damage to nearby targets.

Gain Super energy and stacks of Bolt Charge based on number of targets hit by Ballistic Slam.

3469412974.name: Whisper of Bonds
3469412974.description: Defeating frozen targets generates an Orb of Power.

2661180600.name: Echo of Instability
2661180600.description: Defeating targets with grenades grants Volatile Rounds to your Void weapons.

2265076177.name: Suppressor Grenade
2265076177.description: An explosive grenade that suppresses, preventing targets from using abilities for a short time.

2809342386.name: Shackle Grenade
2809342386.description: A thrown weapon of weighted Strand matter that detonates on impact, suspending targets and creating additional suspending subprojectiles.

1869939007.name: Stormtrance
1869939007.description:
Chain Arc Lightning from your hands to electrify targets with devastating streams of Arc Light that intensify over time. Casting Stormtrance creates a jolting shockwave underneath you.

[Sprint]  : Teleport forward, consuming a small amount of Super energy.

124726502.name: Facet of Sacrifice
124726502.description: While you have an Arc, Solar, or Void buff, ability final blows grant bonus Darkness Transcendence energy.

4249729126.name: Ensnaring Slam
4249729126.description:
Activate your air move to consume your class ability energy and dive to the ground, suspending all nearby targets on impact.

Suspending combatants with this ability grants you Woven Mail.

This ability's damage increases with your Class stat when your Class stat is 100 or higher.

3854948620.name: Echo of Cessation
3854948620.description:
Finisher final blows create a burst of Void damage that causes nearby combatants to become volatile.

Defeating volatile targets creates a Void Breach.

4249729127.name: Widow's Silk
4249729127.description:
You have an additional grenade charge.

Your Grappling Hook creates a Grapple Tangle at the grapple point.

1698387815.name: Strafe Lift
1698387815.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air with strong directional control.

4016776973.name: Proximity Explosive Knife
4016776973.description: Throw a knife that attaches to surfaces upon impact and explodes when it detects a nearby target.

1128768652.name: Triple Jump
1128768652.description: While airborne, sustain your air control with a second or third jump.

3636300855.name: Gambler's Dodge
3636300855.description: Dodge to perform a deft tumble, avoiding combatant attacks and generating melee ability energy. Energy gain is scaled by your Melee stat. Dodging near enemies increases the energy gain.

124726503.name: Facet of Bravery
124726503.description: Defeating targets with grenade final blows grants Volatile Rounds to your [Void] Void weapons. Defeating targets with powered melee final blows grants Unraveling Rounds to your [Strand] Strand weapons.

4180586736.name: Ember of Resolve
4180586736.description: Solar grenade final blows cure you.

362132294.name: Ember of Empyrean
362132294.description: Solar weapon or ability final blows extend the duration of restoration and radiant effects applied to you. -10 Health ▼

3350493948.name: Strafe Lift
3350493948.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air with strong directional control.

1547656727.name: Magnetic Grenade
1547656727.description: A grenade that attaches to targets and explodes twice.

2087010644.name: Rally Barricade
2087010644.description: Creates a small barrier that you can peek over while aiming down sights; increases weapon reload speed, stability, and range. Draws hostile fire when you stand behind it.

790664813.name: Bleak Watcher
790664813.description: [Grenade]  : Hold to convert your grenade into a [Stasis] Stasis turret that fires slowing projectiles at nearby targets.

2209081649.name: Healing Rift
2209081649.description: Conjure a well of power that continuously heals those inside it.

2984351206.name: Consecration
2984351206.description:
While sliding, activate your charged melee ability to launch a wave of [Solar] Solar energy forward, damaging and scorching targets in front of you as you leap into the air.

While airborne, activate your charged melee again to slam to the ground and create a second larger wave of damaging [Solar] Solar energy. If the wave hits a scorched target, they ignite.

83039194.name: Heat Rises
83039194.description:
You can fire weapons, melee, and throw grenades while gliding.

[Grenade]  : Hold to consume your grenade, gaining Heat Rises and releasing a burst of healing energy that cures nearby allies. The strength of the burst is increased when a Healing Grenade is consumed.

Final blows while airborne increase the duration of Heat Rises and grant melee energy.

1727069367.name: Spark of Beacons
1727069367.description: While you are amplified, your Arc Special or Heavy ammo weapon final blows create a blinding explosion.

2722641740.name: Towering Barricade
2722641740.description: Creates a large barrier that can be used to reinforce a position with cover, and draws hostile fire when you stand behind it.

2321824287.name: Child of the Old Gods
2321824287.description:
Cast your rift to create a Void Soul. When you damage a target with a weapon, your Void Soul flies to them and drains them, doing damage and weakening them. Combatants affected by the Soul are also briefly suppressed.

When a target is being drained, you are granted grenade and melee energy (if running Healing Rift) or health (if running Empowering Rift).

Defeating a target who is being drained by your Void Soul grants class ability energy.

The Void Soul's damage is scaled by the enhanced benefit of the Grenade stat.

187655374.name: Stylish Executioner
187655374.description:
Defeating a weakened, suppressed, or volatile target grants Invisibility and Truesight.

After performing a Stylish Execution, your next melee attack while invisible weakens targets.

4208512223.name: Thread of Wisdom
4208512223.description: Defeating suspended targets creates an Orb of Power.

2868073563.name: Thruster
2868073563.description: Quickly evade in a lateral direction.

1517917190.name: Shackle Grenade
1517917190.description: A thrown weapon of weighted Strand matter that detonates on impact, suspending targets and creating additional suspending subprojectiles.

852252789.name: Throwing Hammer
852252789.description: Throw a hammer from a distance. Picking up a thrown hammer grants melee energy. Energy generated is scaled by your Melee stat. If the hammer struck a target, picking it up grants cure.

3721022587.name: High Jump
3721022587.description: While airborne, jump a second time to reach greater heights.

20616656.name: Triple Jump
20616656.description: While airborne, sustain your air control with a second or third jump.

3277705905.name: Spark of Brilliance
3277705905.description: Defeating a blinded target with precision damage creates a blinding explosion. +10 Super ▲

3192552689.name: Thread of Isolation
3192552689.description: Landing rapid precision hits emits a severing burst from the target.

3232422679.name: Axion Bolt
3232422679.description: A bolt of Void Light that forks on impact into smaller bolts that seek out targets.

4016776975.name: Weighted Throwing Knife
4016776975.description:
Throw a knife that deals extra precision damage and causes scorched targets to ignite.

Precision final blows with this knife immediately recharge your class ability.

3866705246.name: Diamond Lance
3866705246.description:
Shatter or defeat targets with [Stasis] Stasis abilities or weapons to create a Stasis lance.

[Shoot]  : Throw the lance to freeze targets on impact.

[Melee]  : Slam the lance to the ground to freeze targets in a small area.

3492047640.name: Empowering Rift
3492047640.description:
Conjure a well of power that increases weapon damage and ability energy regeneration for those inside it.

Defeating combatants while standing in the Rift grants additional ammo generation.

2708585277.name: Seismic Strike
2708585277.description:
After sprinting for a short time, activate your charged melee ability to slam shoulder-first into your target, damaging and blinding targets in an area around them.

While you are amplified, the blind radius is increased.

2842514288.name: Swarm Grenade
2842514288.description: A grenade that detonates on impact, releasing multiple drones that seek nearby targets. Each drone slightly scorches affected targets.

4208512219.name: Thread of Fury
4208512219.description: Damaging targets with a Tangle grants melee energy. -10 Melee ▼

3260056808.name: Towering Barricade
3260056808.description: Creates a large barrier that can be used to reinforce a position with cover, and draws hostile fire when you stand behind it.

2708585279.name: Thunderclap
2708585279.description:
[Melee] : Hold while grounded to plant your feet and begin charging your fist with Arc energy.

[Melee] : Release to unleash a devastating blast in front of you, dealing damage that increases with longer charge time.

2272984667.name: Echo of Exchange
2272984667.description: Melee final blows grant grenade energy. +10 Melee ▲

3683904166.name: Winter's Wrath
3683904166.description:
Summon a [Stasis] Stasis staff. While your Super is active:

[Super Primary]  : Cast out a barrage of [Stasis] Stasis shards that freeze targets.

[Super Secondary]  : Cast out a shockwave that shatters all frozen targets.

3492047641.name: Healing Rift
3492047641.description: Conjure a well of power that continuously heals those inside it.

4016776974.name: Lightweight Knife
4016776974.description: Quickly throw a knife that deals moderate damage. Precision hits with this knife make you radiant for a short duration.

1582574009.name: Arcbolt Grenade
1582574009.description: A grenade that chains bolts of lightning to nearby targets.

4208512222.name: Thread of Warding
4208512222.description: Picking up an Orb of Power grants Woven Mail. -10 Health ▼

2368990400.name: Whisper of Reversal
2368990400.description: While you have Frost Armor, melee damage slows your target.

3923577992.name: Suppressor Grenade
3923577992.description: An explosive grenade that suppresses, preventing targets from using abilities for a short time.

2529942645.name: Glacial Quake
2529942645.description:
Summon a [Stasis] Stasis gauntlet. While your Super is active:

[Heavy Attack]  : Slam your gauntlet down to create a shockwave that freezes targets and sends out [Stasis] Stasis crystals to freeze additional ones.

[Light Attack]  : Supercharge your Shiver Strike for bonus damage. Sprint through [Stasis] Stasis crystals or frozen targets to shatter them instantly.

2470512752.name: Grapple
2470512752.description:
Weave a grappling hook, and quickly pull yourself forward. Grappling to a Tangle immediately recharges your grenade energy.

During and shortly after grappling, your melee attack deals area damage and unravels targets.

1293395731.name: Arc Soul
1293395731.description:
Cast your Rift to create an Arc Soul that fires at targets in front of you. Allies can pass through your Rift to get an Arc Soul. Your Rift charges faster when allies are near.

While amplified, your Arc Souls are supercharged and gain increased fire rate.

Arc Soul damage is scaled by the enhanced benefit of the Grenade stat.

383852320.name: Healing Rift
383852320.description: Conjure a well of power that continuously heals those inside it.

119041299.name: Fists of Havoc
119041299.description:
Supercharge your fists and slam the ground with the force of a maelstrom. While active:

[Light Attack]  : Quickly dash forward, dealing damage to any impacted targets.

[Heavy Attack]  : Slam your fists to the ground, blinding targets and dealing damage in an area around you, leaving aftershocks in your wake. Performing a slam from the air or after a dash deals additional damage.

2835214902.name: Winter's Shroud
2835214902.description:
Dodging slows nearby targets.

Slowing targets briefly increases your class ability regeneration.

4260353952.name: Sentinel Shield
4260353952.description:
[Super]  : Summon a shield of Void Light. 
While Sentinel Shield is active:
[Light Attack]  : Attack.
[Block]  : Block.
[Grenade]  : Perform a Shield Throw.

Guard with Sentinel Shield to create a defensive wall that draws hostile fire. Allies behind the shield have increased survivability, weapon damage, and passive reload.

Guarding allies and blocking damage makes the shield last longer and increases your Shield Throw damage.

4249729124.name: Whirling Maelstrom
4249729124.description: Destroying a Tangle will weave a violent, writhing mass of [Strand] Strand fibers. The Strand mass seeks out and damages targets, emitting Unraveling projectiles when it defeats them.

4220332374.name: Shield Throw
4220332374.description: Hurl your Void Shield toward a target. The shield can ricochet off targets and surfaces, granting Overshield for each target hit.

4208512220.name: Thread of Rebirth
4208512220.description: [Strand] Strand weapon final blows have a chance to create a Threadling.

2747500761.name: Hammer of Sol
2747500761.description:
Summon a flaming hammer and wreak destruction down upon your enemies.

[Light Attack]  : Throw your hammer at foes.

Upon impact, your hammers shatter into explosive molten shards.

3636300854.name: Marksman's Dodge
3636300854.description: Dodge to perform an evasive maneuver with a steady hand. Dodging automatically collects nearby ammo boxes and reloads all weapons.

3199702642.name: Swarm Grenade
3199702642.description: A grenade that detonates on impact, releasing multiple drones that seek nearby targets. Each drone slightly scorches affected targets.

1470370539.name: Celestial Fire
1470370539.description: Send out a spiral of three explosive Solar energy blasts, scorching targets with each hit.

95544330.name: High Jump
95544330.description: While airborne, jump a second time to reach greater heights.

266130438.name: Strafe Lift
266130438.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air with strong directional control.

489583096.name: Towering Barricade
489583096.description: Creates a large barrier that can be used to reinforce a position with cover, and draws hostile fire when you stand behind it.

790664810.name: Weaver's Call
790664810.description:
Activate your class ability to weave three Threadlings and deploy any Threadlings you have perched.

Dealing damage and defeating targets generates perched Threadlings.

1399219.name: Coldsnap Grenade
1399219.description: A grenade that freezes on impact and sends another seeker to find and freeze targets.

2835214901.name: Ascension
2835214901.description:
[Air Move]  While airborne, consume your class ability energy to summon your Arc Staff, propelling yourself upward and creating a burst of energy around you that amplifies allies and jolts targets.

This ability's damage increases with your Class stat when your Class stat is 100 or higher.

2626922127.name: Facet of Generosity
2626922127.description: Defeating targets while transcendent creates Orbs of Power for your allies.

2984351204.name: Roaring Flames
2984351204.description: Final blows with [Solar] Solar abilities or ignitions increase the damage of your Solar abilities. Stacks 3 times.

1698387812.name: Catapult Lift
1698387812.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air with a strong initial burst of momentum.

1656549674.name: Knockout
1656549674.description:
Critically wounding a target or breaking their shield infuses your melee attacks with Arc energy and increases your melee range against combatants and melee damage against combatants and Guardians for a short time.

Defeating targets with melee attacks makes you amplified and restores a portion of your health. Defeating more powerful combatants increases the amount of health restored.

2994412667.name: Lightning Grenade
2994412667.description: A grenade that sticks to any surface and emits bolts of lightning.

3277705906.name: Spark of Amplitude
3277705906.description: Rapidly defeating targets while you are amplified creates an Orb of Power.

1051276348.name: Ember of Eruption
1051276348.description: Your Solar ignitions have increased area of effect. +10 Melee ▲

2031919264.name: Tectonic Harvest
2031919264.description:
Picking up [Stasis] Stasis shards grants stacks of Frost Armor.

While you have Frost Armor, defeating combatants with Stasis or Kinetic weapons may cause them to shatter, damaging other nearby combatants. The shatter chance increases with your Frost Armor stacks.

Taking damage while you have Frost Armor generates melee energy.

2272984670.name: Echo of Leeching
2272984670.description: Melee final blows start health regeneration for you and nearby allies.

1588878498.name: Strafe Jump
1588878498.description: While airborne, jump a second time with strong directional control.

3469412970.name: Whisper of Hedrons
3469412970.description: Increases weapon handling and health after freezing a target with [Stasis] Stasis.

2868073561.name: Towering Barricade
2868073561.description: Creates a large barrier that can be used to reinforce a position with cover, and draws hostile fire when you stand behind it.

537774541.name: Whisper of Torment
537774541.description: You gain grenade energy each time you take damage from targets. Having Frost Armor increases the amount of energy gained. -10 Grenade ▼

2657901007.name: Snare Bomb
2657901007.description:
Throw a Smoke Bomb that attaches to surfaces and pings enemy radar, then detonates into a disorienting smoke cloud, weakening nearby targets. Targets within the smoke cloud take damage over time.

Upon deployment, makes nearby allies invisible.

1885339915.name: Needlestorm
1885339915.description:
[Super]  : Conjure a hail of deadly woven needles.

After embedding themselves in the environment, the needles will re-weave into a host of Threadlings.

Threadlings you create will return to you and perch if they can't find any nearby targets. Damaging targets with your weapons or melee will send out perched Threadlings to attack.

1232050830.name: Ball Lightning
1232050830.description:
Fire an Arc projectile forward that releases a perpendicular lightning strike after a short time.

While amplified, Ball Lightning releases additional lightning strikes before detonating.

262821312.name: Weavewalk
262821312.description:
[Air Dodge]  : Dodge while airborne to consume your melee energy and enter the weave, gaining damage resistance from combatants and players. Reactivate your air dodge or cast your Rift to exit the weave, generating Woven Mail for you and nearby allies.

While in the weave, your melee energy is drained and you generate perched Threadlings over time. Threadling hits generate ability energy.

1232050831.name: Chain Lightning
1232050831.description:
An extended range melee that jolts your target and chains lightning to nearby targets.

While amplified, it creates an additional set of chains.

2274196886.name: Daybreak
2274196886.description:
Fashion Solar Light into blades and smite your foes from the sky.

Your Daybreak projectiles scorch targets on impact.

1727069363.name: Spark of Ions
1727069363.description: Defeating a jolted target or defeating a target with Bolt Charge creates an Ionic Trace.

2021620139.name: Glacial Quake
2021620139.description:
Summon a [Stasis] Stasis gauntlet. While your Super is active:

[Heavy Attack]  : Slam your gauntlet down to create a shockwave that freezes targets and sends out [Stasis] Stasis crystals to freeze additional ones.

[Light Attack]  : Supercharge your Shiver Strike for bonus damage. Sprint through [Stasis] Stasis crystals or frozen targets to shatter them instantly.

362132293.name: Ember of Singeing
362132293.description: Your class ability recharges faster when you scorch targets.

2031919265.name: Cryoclasm
2031919265.description: Your slide distance is greatly increased. Sliding releases a wave that shatters [Stasis] Stasis crystals or frozen targets on contact, along with any other frozen targets nearby.

1380268164.name: Catapult Lift
1380268164.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air with a strong initial burst of momentum.

25156514.name: Empowering Rift
25156514.description:
Conjure a well of power that increases weapon damage and ability energy regeneration for those inside it.

Defeating combatants while standing in the Rift grants additional ammo generation.

83039192.name: Hellion
83039192.description:
Activate your class ability to summon a [Solar] Solar mortar that lobs flaming projectiles at distant targets. Targets damaged by the mortar are scorched.

Hellion damage is scaled by the enhanced benefit of the Grenade stat.

2626922126.name: Facet of Dawn
2626922126.description: Powered melee hits against targets makes you radiant. Powered melee final blows make you and nearby allies radiant.

2370269384.name: Silkstrike
2370269384.description:
Weave a vicious rope dart and tear through your targets.

[Light Attack]  : Swing the rope dart in front of you to deal damage. The tip of the dart deals bonus damage, and defeating targets with the tip causes them to explode.

[Heavy Attack]  : Swing the rope dart in a circular motion to deal heavy damage all around you.

[Grenade]  : Use the grapple to move forward quickly.

1399216.name: Duskfield Grenade
1399216.description: A grenade that shatters on impact, leaving behind a field that slows targets and freezes those who do not leave the volume.

1713935764.name: Pulse Grenade
1713935764.description: A grenade that periodically damages targets within its explosion radius.

1841016428.name: Healing Grenade
1841016428.description: A grenade that cures allies on impact and creates an Orb of benevolent Solar Light, granting restoration to allies when picked up.

4260353953.name: Ward of Dawn
4260353953.description:
Create a protective dome for you and your allies.

While inside Ward of Dawn, allies gain Void overshield and increased weapon damage, while targets inside the Ward are weakened.

The Ward's owner also gains increased melee damage while inside and can pick up and throw the Ward's core to reposition the Ward up to two times.

2272984664.name: Echo of Provision
2272984664.description: Damaging targets with grenades grants melee energy.

2626922115.name: Facet of Justice
2626922115.description: While transcendent, your ability final blows explode.

852252788.name: Hammer Strike
852252788.description:
After sprinting for a short time, use this melee ability to swing a blazing hammer that scorches your target and deals damage in a cone behind them.

If your target is defeated by Hammer Strike, they ignite.

5333294.name: Balanced Glide
5333294.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with both moderate speed and directional control.

2370269389.name: Shadowshot: Deadfall
2370269389.description:
Tether foes to a Void Anchor, dramatically weakening and suppressing them for you and your allies.

The Void Anchors fired from Shadowshot pull targets toward the impact point, which then become traps and wait for prey. Void Anchors have increased range and last longer.

4154539171.name: Balanced Glide
4154539171.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with both moderate speed and directional control.

2979486801.name: Phoenix Dive
2979486801.description:
Dive to the ground and create a burst of Solar Light that cures nearby allies.

While Heat Rises is active, you gain restoration while diving and scorch targets upon landing.

890263313.name: Strafe Glide
890263313.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with strong directional control.

3769507635.name: Storm's Edge
3769507635.description:
Summon an electrified dagger and throw it in your aim direction.

When the dagger hits a surface or a target, you blink to its location and perform a powerful whirling strike, damaging any nearby targets. Can be reactivated after the strike to perform additional throws.

If the dagger flies for long enough without impacting anything, it detonates and you blink to the detonation location.

362132291.name: Ember of Char
362132291.description: Your Solar ignitions spread scorch to affected targets. +10 Grenade ▲

1396318109.name: Transcendence
1396318109.description:
Achieve harmony by dealing damage with Light and Dark damage types in equal measure or by applying subclass buffs to your allies. Kinetic damage generates both Light and Dark energy.

While Transcendence is active, your grenade is replaced by a unique Prismatic grenade that deals both Light and Dark damage. Dealing melee damage while transcendent greatly increases your grenade energy regeneration, and vice versa. Defeating targets while transcendent extends its duration.

2657901005.name: Combination Blow
2657901005.description:
A quick strike that temporarily increases your melee damage when defeating a target, stacking three times.

Defeating targets with this, grants class ability energy and restores a small amount of health. Energy gain is scaled by your Class stat.

5333293.name: Burst Glide
5333293.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with a strong initial boost of speed.

1727069361.name: Spark of Frequency
1727069361.description:
Melee hits increase your equipped weapon's reload speed and stability for a short duration.

While amplified, the effects are increased and you gain increased stacks of Bolt Charge from all sources.

2087010645.name: Towering Barricade
2087010645.description: Creates a large barrier that can be used to reinforce a position with cover, and draws hostile fire when you stand behind it.

2272984669.name: Echo of Reprisal
2272984669.description: Final blows when surrounded by combatants grant Super energy.

2626922114.name: Facet of Balance
2626922114.description: Rapidly defeating targets with Light damage grants melee energy. Rapidly defeating targets with Darkness damage grants grenade energy.

3469412975.name: Whisper of Shards
3469412975.description: Shattering a [Stasis] Stasis crystal temporarily boosts your grenade recharge rate. Shattering additional [Stasis] Stasis crystals increases the duration of this benefit.

2642597904.name: Bleak Watcher
2642597904.description: [Grenade]  : Hold to convert your grenade into a [Stasis] Stasis turret that fires slowing projectiles at nearby targets.

3686638442.name: Burst Glide
3686638442.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with a strong initial boost of speed.

1602994571.name: Unbreakable
1602994571.description:
[Grenade]  : Hold to summon a [Void] Void shield that draws hostile fire and blocks a portion of incoming damage, gradually draining your grenade energy and granting an Overshield over time.

Releasing the grenade input or running out of energy releases a frontal blast from your shield that disorients combatants and deals increased damage based on how much damage was blocked. Final blows with the frontal blast grant you Devour.

Combatants that come in contact with your shield are temporarily disoriented.

1128768655.name: Strafe Jump
1128768655.description: While airborne, jump a second time with strong directional control.

4184589900.name: Touch of Winter
4184589900.description:
Your Glacier, Duskfield, Coldsnap, and Shatter grenades have enhanced functionality.

Glacier Grenade: Adds a [Stasis] Stasis crystal and changes the formation.

Duskfield Grenade: Increases slow-field size and creates a small [Stasis] Stasis crystal on impact.

Coldsnap Grenade: Seekers duplicate after freezing a target and create a [Stasis] Stasis crystal on detonation.

Shatter Grenade: Creates additional shrapnel projectiles on detonation. Hitting frozen targets with this grenade refunds some grenade energy.

2225231094.name: Catapult Lift
2225231094.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air with a strong initial burst of momentum.

1727069374.name: Spark of Magnitude
1727069374.description: Your lingering Arc grenades (Lightning Grenade, Pulse Grenade, and Storm Grenade) have extended duration.

74393640.name: Facet of Defiance
74393640.description: Finishers create a detonation that either jolts, scorches, slows, severs, or makes targets volatile based on the damage type of your equipped Super.

537774543.name: Whisper of Impetus
537774543.description: Damaging targets with a [Stasis] Stasis melee reloads your weapons and grants you a temporary boost to weapon ready speed. +10 Health ▲

4260353955.name: Twilight Arsenal
4260353955.description:
[Super]  : Summon three Void axes and throw them at your foes one after another. On impact, the axes pull in nearby targets and detonate in a weakening explosion. After exploding, the axes can be picked up by you or your allies and used as a weapon for a short time.

While carrying a Void axe:
[Light Attack]  : Slash forward with your axe, dealing damage and weakening targets.
[Heavy Attack]  : Throw the axe, consuming all remaining ammo.

890263312.name: Burst Glide
890263312.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with a strong initial boost of speed.

2979486802.name: Empowering Rift
2979486802.description:
Conjure a well of power that increases weapon damage and ability energy regeneration for those inside it.

Defeating combatants while standing in the Rift grants additional ammo generation.

124726505.name: Facet of Awakening
124726505.description: Rapidly defeating targets with Light or Darkness damage or Super final blows generates an Elemental pickup of the matching damage type.

3478354816.name: Spark of Instinct
3478354816.description: While critically wounded, taking damage emits a burst of damaging Arc energy that jolts targets.

3644045871.name: Arcane Needle
3644045871.description: Sling a woven needle that will embed in your target, unraveling them. Activate your melee ability again to chain up to two additional attacks.

2225231093.name: Strafe Lift
2225231093.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air with strong directional control.

375052469.name: Golden Gun: Deadshot
375052469.description:
Summon a rapid-fire flaming pistol that scorches and disintegrates targets with Solar Light.

Final blows with this weapon refund a Golden Gun round and extend your super duration.

Benefits from being radiant.

1324853482.name: Freezing Singularity
1324853482.description: [Grenade]  : Throw a mass of [Void] Void energy and [Stasis] Stasis matter. On impact, deploys a miniature black hole orbited by a slowing field. After a short duration, the black hole implodes, suppressing and dealing heavy damage to all nearby targets.

3644045869.name: Incinerator Snap
3644045869.description: Snap your fingers to create a fan of burning sparks that explode and scorch targets.

266130439.name: High Lift
266130439.description: Jump while airborne to activate Lift and launch into the air to greater heights.

2625980631.name: Silence and Squall
2625980631.description:
Summon two Stasis kamas, Silence and Squall, that you throw one after another.

Silence : Creates a flash-freeze blast that freezes and damages targets.

Squall : Creates a Stasis Storm that slows and damages targets caught inside.

1869939001.name: Needlestorm
1869939001.description:
[Super]  : Conjure a hail of deadly woven needles.

After embedding themselves in the environment, the needles will re-weave into a host of Threadlings.

Threadlings you create will return to you and perch if they can't find any nearby targets. Damaging targets with your weapons or melee will send out perched Threadlings to attack.

2711519340.name: Gambler's Dodge
2711519340.description: Dodge to perform a deft tumble, avoiding combatant attacks and generating melee ability energy. Energy gain is scaled by your Melee stat. Dodging near enemies increases the energy gain.

426473317.name: Gambler's Dodge
426473317.description: Dodge to perform a deft tumble, avoiding combatant attacks and generating melee ability energy. Energy gain is scaled by your Melee stat. Dodging near enemies increases the energy gain.

2581086849.name: Incendiary Grenade
2581086849.description: A grenade that explodes in a fiery burst and heavily scorches nearby targets.

1727069364.name: Spark of Shock
1727069364.description: Your Arc grenades jolt targets. -10 Grenade ▼

4194622037.name: Tempest Strike
4194622037.description:
While sliding, activate your charged melee ability to unleash a devastating uppercut attack that travels along the ground in front of you, damaging and jolting targets it hits.

Defeating jolted targets grants a stack of Bolt Charge.

4228170798.name: Threadling Grenade
4228170798.description: A woven projectile that reweaves itself into Threadlings while in flight.

3644045867.name: Penumbral Blast
3644045867.description: Raise your [Stasis] Stasis staff against your foe. Send a blast of [Stasis] Stasis forward to freeze your targets.

1588878497.name: Triple Jump
1588878497.description: While airborne, sustain your air control with a second or third jump.

3769507632.name: Gathering Storm
3769507632.description:
Hurl your Arc Staff forward, embedding it into surfaces or large targets and jolting nearby targets.

After a short time, a devastating lightning bolt strikes the staff, overcharging it with Arc energy. While overcharged, your staff discharges lightning at nearby foes.

362132290.name: Ember of Tempering
362132290.description:
Solar weapon final blows grant you and your allies increased health for a short duration. Stacks 3 times.

While Ember of Tempering is active, your weapons have increased airborne effectiveness, and your Solar weapon final blows create a Firesprite. -10 Class ▼

1869939004.name: Nova Bomb: Cataclysm
1869939004.description:
Hurl an explosive bolt of Void Light at a target, disintegrating those caught within its blast.

Nova Bomb travels slowly and seeks targets. Detonations shatter into smaller seeker projectiles.

3192552688.name: Thread of Binding
3192552688.description: Super final blows emit a suspending burst from the target. +10 Health ▲

2626922121.name: Facet of Grace
2626922121.description: Defeating targets with Kinetic weapons grants you bonus Transcendence energy. Defeating targets with your Super grants you and nearby allies bonus Transcendence energy. -10 Health ▼

4208512218.name: Thread of Mind
4208512218.description: Defeating suspended targets grants class ability energy.

383852321.name: Empowering Rift
383852321.description:
Conjure a well of power that increases weapon damage and ability energy regeneration for those inside it.

Defeating combatants while standing in the Rift grants additional ammo generation.

1051276349.name: Ember of Ashes
1051276349.description: You apply more scorch stacks to targets.

2483898430.name: Whisper of Rime
2483898430.description: Your Frost Armor has increased duration and maximum stack count.

3721022586.name: Strafe Jump
3721022586.description: While airborne, jump a second time with strong directional control.

934199459.name: Glacier Grenade
934199459.description: A grenade that creates walls out of [Stasis] Stasis crystals to block damage and freeze targets; these walls can be shattered for damage.

2529942644.name: Thundercrash
2529942644.description: Hurtle through the air like a missile and crash into targets to inflict meteoric damage.

2321824284.name: Feed the Void
2321824284.description:
Defeat a target with a Void ability to activate Devour.

Your Devour effects are improved, restoring additional health and grenade energy.

1051276350.name: Ember of Wonder
1051276350.description: Rapidly defeating multiple targets with Solar ignitions generates an Orb of Power. +10 Health ▲

2835214900.name: Stylish Executioner
2835214900.description:
Defeating a target affected by any elemental debuff grants invisibility and Truesight.

After performing a Stylish Execution, your next melee attack while invisible weakens targets.

1444664839.name: Empowering Rift
1444664839.description:
Conjure a well of power that increases weapon damage and ability energy regeneration for those inside it.

Defeating combatants while standing in the Rift grants additional ammo generation.

2529942646.name: Twilight Arsenal
2529942646.description:
