[Super]  : Summon three Void axes and throw them at your foes one after another. On impact, the axes pull in nearby targets and detonate in a weakening explosion. After exploding, the axes can be picked up by you or your allies and used as a weapon for a short time.

While carrying a Void axe:
[Light Attack]  : Slash forward with your axe, dealing damage and weakening targets.
[Heavy Attack]  : Throw the axe, consuming all remaining ammo.

3469412969.name: Whisper of Durance
3469412969.description: Slow that you apply to targets lasts longer. For those abilities that linger, their duration will also increase.

4198689901.name: Flux Grenade
4198689901.description: An explosive grenade that attaches to targets.

1727069375.name: Spark of Recharge
1727069375.description: While critically wounded, your melee and grenade energy regenerates more quickly.

3686638443.name: Strafe Glide
3686638443.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with strong directional control.

1588878499.name: High Jump
1588878499.description: While airborne, jump a second time to reach greater heights.

124726497.name: Facet of Command
124726497.description:
Freezing or suppressing a target reloads your equipped weapons and increases weapon stability, aim assist, and airborne effectiveness.

Defeating frozen or suppressed targets creates a Stasis Shard or Void Breach.

3644045868.name: Chain Lightning
3644045868.description:
An extended range melee that jolts your target and chains lightning to nearby targets.

While amplified, it creates an additional set of chains.

2321824286.name: Soul Siphon
2321824286.description:
Ready this aspect by striking a foe with your powered melee ability.

Once readied, press your melee ability to begin siphoning energy from all combatants in front of you, dealing damage and gathering Overshield and class ability energy from each target.

Soul Siphon's damage is scaled by the enhanced benefit of the Melee stat.

1139822081.name: Snare Bomb
1139822081.description:
Throw a Smoke Bomb that attaches to surfaces and pings enemy radar, then detonates into a disorienting smoke cloud, weakening nearby targets. Targets within the smoke cloud take damage over time.

Upon deployment, makes nearby allies invisible.

3478354817.name: Spark of Haste
3478354817.description: While sprinting, you have greatly increased health stat.

2628485816.name: Strafe Glide
2628485816.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with strong directional control.

2711519341.name: Marksman's Dodge
2711519341.description: Dodge to perform an evasive maneuver with a steady hand. Dodging automatically collects nearby ammo boxes and reloads all weapons.

2272984657.name: Echo of Domineering
2272984657.description:
After suppressing a target, you gain increased weapon stat for a short duration, and your equipped weapon is reloaded from reserves.

Defeating suppressed targets creates a Void Breach.

2370269390.name: Golden Gun: Marksman
2370269390.description:
Summon a precision flaming pistol that scorches and disintegrates targets with Solar Light.

Your Golden Gun deals massively increased precision damage, overpenetrates targets, and creates Orbs of Power on precision hits.

Benefits from being radiant.

2202441959.name: Firebolt Grenade
2202441959.description: A grenade that unleashes bolts of damaging Solar Light at nearby targets and slightly scorches them.

3721022585.name: Triple Jump
3721022585.description: While airborne, sustain your air control with a second or third jump.

3531427692.name: Triple Jump
3531427692.description: While airborne, sustain your air control with a second or third jump.

1656118681.name: Nova Bomb: Vortex
1656118681.description:
Hurl an explosive bolt of Void Light at a target, disintegrating those caught within its blast.

Nova Bomb creates a singularity that pulls targets inward and continually damages those trapped inside.

4194622036.name: Flow State
4194622036.description:
Defeating a jolted target makes you amplified.

While you are amplified, your dodge recharges more quickly, you are more resilient while dodging, and your reload speed is greatly increased.

362132289.name: Ember of Combustion
362132289.description: Final blows with a Solar Super causes targets to ignite and creates a Firesprite. +10 Melee ▲

4265391440.name: Coldsnap Grenade
4265391440.description: A grenade that freezes on impact and sends another seeker to find and freeze targets.

3994381207.name: Threadling Grenade
3994381207.description: A woven projectile that reweaves itself into Threadlings while in flight.

886607940.name: Magnetic Grenade
886607940.description: A grenade that attaches to targets and explodes twice.

1081893460.name: Stormtrance
1081893460.description:
Chain Arc Lightning from your hands to electrify targets with devastating streams of Arc Light that intensify over time. Casting Stormtrance creates a jolting shockwave underneath you.

[Sprint]  : Teleport forward, consuming a small amount of Super energy.

4154539168.name: Burst Glide
4154539168.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with a strong initial boost of speed.

489583097.name: Rally Barricade
489583097.description: Creates a small barrier that you can peek over while aiming down sights; increases weapon reload speed, stability, and range. Draws hostile fire when you stand behind it.

20616659.name: Strafe Jump
20616659.description: While airborne, jump a second time with strong directional control.

3686638441.name: Balanced Glide
3686638441.description: Jump while airborne to activate Glide and start an airborne drift with both moderate speed and directional control.

1399218.name: Shatter Grenade
1399218.description: A grenade that sticks to combatants before exploding into razor-sharp [Stasis] Stasis shrapnel. The shrapnel ricochets off surfaces, dealing damage to all in its path. Hitting a frozen target shatters it instantly and deals bonus damage.

4208512216.name: Thread of Ascent
4208512216.description: Activating your grenade ability reloads your equipped weapon and grants bonus airborne effectiveness and handling for a short duration. +10 Weapon ▲

1225978592.name: Grapple
1225978592.description:
Weave a grappling hook, and quickly pull yourself forward. Grappling to a Tangle immediately recharges your grenade energy.

During and shortly after grappling, your melee attack deals area damage and unravels targets.

1563930741.name: Howl of the Storm
1563930741.description:
While sliding, activate your charged melee ability to launch a wave of [Stasis] Stasis energy forward that freezes enemy combatants, slows enemy players, and creates [Stasis] Stasis crystals.

Grants an additional melee charge.

1470370538.name: Incinerator Snap
1470370538.description: Snap your fingers to create a fan of burning sparks that explode and scorch targets.

2495523340.name: Towering Barricade
2495523340.description: Creates a large barrier that can be used to reinforce a position with cover, and draws hostile fire when you stand behind it.

362132292.name: Ember of Benevolence
362132292.description: Applying restoration, cure, or radiant to allies grants increased grenade, melee, and class ability regeneration for a short duration. -10 Grenade ▼

124726500.name: Facet of Mending
124726500.description: Grenade final blows cure you. Transcendence grenade final blows increase the strength of the effect.

2299867342.name: Pocket Singularity
2299867342.description:
Launch an unstable ball of Void energy that detonates when it nears a target, pushing them away from the blast and making them volatile.  

Provides multiple charges.

262821318.name: Mindspun Invocation
262821318.description:
Your grapple, Shackle Grenade, Threadling Grenade, and Slicewire Grenade have enhanced functionality.

Your grapple melee spawns three Threadlings.

[Grenade]  : Hold to consume your Shackle Grenade and activate Weaver's Trance. Final blows while Weaver's Trance is active create a suspending detonation.

[Grenade]  : Hold to charge your Threadling Grenade, causing it to weave a Threadling Nest at the impact location that repeatedly spawns Threadlings. 

[Grenade]  : Hold to charge your Slicewire Grenade. The grenade's final detonation will launch submunitions and leave a Tangle in its wake.

3192552690.name: Thread of Continuity
3192552690.description: Suspend, unravel, and sever effects applied to targets have increased duration.

4220332375.name: Shield Bash
4220332375.description: After sprinting for a short time, use this melee ability to unleash a devastating Shield Bash that suppresses the target. Final blows with Shield Bash grant an Overshield.

1237488984.name: Blink
1237488984.description: Jump while airborne to teleport a short distance.

95544329.name: Blink
95544329.description: Jump while airborne to teleport a short distance.

1262901525.name: Drengr's Lash
1262901525.description:
Activate your Barricade ability to create a ripple in reality that travels forward along the ground, suspending and damaging the targets it hits.

Final blows on targets affected by Suspend, Unravel, or Sever grant class ability energy.

This ability's damage increases with your Class stat when your Class stat is 100 or higher. Activate Thruster to create an unstable knot of [Strand] Strand matter that detonates after a short delay, suspending and damaging targets.

Final blows on targets affected by elemental debuffs grant Thruster energy.

1051276351.name: Ember of Searing
1051276351.description: Defeating scorched targets grants melee energy and creates a Firesprite. +10 Class ▲

2979486803.name: Healing Rift
2979486803.description: Conjure a well of power that continuously heals those inside it.

3469412971.name: Whisper of Fissures
3469412971.description: Increases the damage and size of the burst of [Stasis] Stasis when you destroy a [Stasis] Stasis crystal or defeat a frozen target.

3574662354.name: Bladefury
3574662354.description:
[Super]  : Create two woven blades and roam the battlefield. While active:

[Light Attack]  : Perform a leaping slash towards nearby targets, severing them on hit and dealing bonus damage to suspended targets. Each successful hit briefly increases your attack speed and grants energy for your heavy attack.

[Heavy Attack]  : Unleash a heavy upward slash, creating two suspending projectiles that seek out targets.
